description: After the championship game, a league official must coordinate the on-field trophy presentation ceremony.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the broadcast producer to schedule the ceremony.

expected_outcome.value: The ceremony is scheduled to happen immediately after the game ends.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the championship trophy is securely transported to the field.

expected_outcome.value: The trophy is in position for the ceremony.

nodes.task_description: Direct the winning team and league officials to the presentation stage.

expected_outcome.value: All necessary personnel are in place for the ceremony.
